calendar.matters:
ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Leutza for and with Ronald Katz.

Mr. Katz stated that they were not aware of the other properties until the preliminary title search had been conducted through escrow. In addition, he stated that he became aware of the four Children when the Sister's Attorney provided them with a copy of the pour over will, that they had made an effort to contact the Children, but that the Sister was not providing addresses for them. The Court vacated the Order Appointing The Administrator, revoked the Letters Of Administration and stated that it could not proceed with what had been provided. The Court suggested the parties file a petition to probate the will.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy W. Yee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR For Resetting Of The Petition For Instructions Heard On July 09, 2008.
Off Calendar Sep-10-2008 Text Ruling

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Aug-25-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steve Leutza for Ronald Katz (Admnistrator).

The Court stated that further research was needed and took the matter under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth CSR#5162. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M.Loos.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2006 Granted Per Written Order
